title: kosteletzkya augusti
intro: Kosteletzkya augusti, also known as the West Indian sea island cotton or cotton bush, is a flowering plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, Kosteletzkya augusti is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
